meta.title: Document AI: How Agents add the brain to OCR's eyes
meta.description:
OCR can process characters but it doesn’t understand pixels. OCR has no way to reason about the headers, totals, or checkboxes found in tables, invoices, or forms. 

In our course with LandingAI, "Document AI: From OCR to Agentic Doc Extraction," we build agents to address these failure modes by breaking documents into pieces, applying the right tools, and mapping information to expected formats. 

Learn more and enroll today: https://bit.ly/3Lmuqxf
